title: ceratostylis curvimentum
intro: Ceratostylis curvimentum, also known as the curved lip orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which are traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ceratostylis curvimentum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, where the rhizomes are steeped in hot water to extract its active compounds.
